tasks.label: java (build): Build Workspace
tasks.detail: $(tools) Build all the Java projects in workspace.

tasks.label: Maven deploy (local)
tasks.command: if [ -z "${CPP_DOCKER_DIR}" ]; then echo 'Error: CPP_DOCKER_DIR environment variable is not set'; exit 1; fi && export WILDFLY_DEPLOYMENT_DIR=${CPP_DOCKER_DIR}/containers/wildfly/deployments && export CONTEXT_NAME=listing&& echo 'Sourcing deployment and healthcheck functions...' && source ${CPP_DOCKER_DIR}/build-scripts/deployment-functions.sh && source ${CPP_DOCKER_DIR}/build-scripts/healthcheck-functions.sh && echo 'Building application...' && mvn clean install -DskipTests && echo 'Undeploying existing wars...' && undeployWarsFromDocker && echo 'Deploying new war...' && deployWarsForContextsWithoutServiceModule && echo 'Waiting for deployment to complete...' && sleep 30 && echo 'Running health checks...' && healthchecksForContextsWithoutServiceModule
